**What's slow or failing**

**Where / when**

- [ ] Module lazy-load

- [ ] Stroke rendering (HanziWriter)
- [ ] Offline / PWA (no network)
- [ ] IndexedDB / storage / eviction
- [ ] Demo mode

- Browser (+ version):
